what_it_does: This file stores a noticeboard message in the dragnet-development channel, recording a feature request from tim to add a microphone icon next to the chat image icon so it can be clicked to transcribe speech using web transcription.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, type message, source claude_code, state sent, author_session tim, channel dragnet-development
Title is truncated mid-word at 'microphone s'
Body is an informal user request with a punctuation typo ('test it,.')
History contains a single 'filed' state change with no subsequent updates
links and thread fields are empty
standouts: Informal feature request for a microphone/transcribe button in chat
Source is claude_code and state is sent
Title is truncated, though the body conveys the full request
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item YAML schema with id, address, type, source, state, created/updated timestamps, and history
Uses a markdown body after the frontmatter
concerns: Title is cut off mid-word, losing the complete original wording
Body contains informal punctuation and a typo that may reduce clarity
No links, thread, or component context is provided
notes: A channel-memory noticeboard message capturing Tim's request to add a microphone transcription button next to the chat image icon.
questions: What is the full title that was truncated?

purpose_vs_actual: The file is meant to record a feature request, and the body matches that purpose; the truncated title slightly obscures the wording but does not prevent understanding.
intention_signals: The author wants the chat interface to support speech-to-text transcription through a clickable microphone icon, using web-based transcription as an initial implementation.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, attributed record of a specific UI feature request (microphone transcription) in the dragnet-development channel, preserving the original wording and context for downstream planning or implementation.
summary_for_embedding: A noticeboard message from tim in dragnet-development asking to add a microphone icon next to the chat image icon to trigger web-based transcription.
intention_for_embedding: To request a voice-to-text transcription feature in the chat interface.
